device_description: A sterile, single-use catheter designed for vascular access procedures in interventional cardiology and radiology settings.
intended_purpose: To provide vascular access for the delivery of therapeutic agents, placement of stents, and diagnostic sampling in cardiovascular procedures.
indications_for_use: Indicated for use in adult patients undergoing coronary angiography, percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI), and peripheral vascular interventions.
target_patient_population: Adult patients (18 years and over) requiring vascular access for interventional cardiology or radiology procedures.
intended_user_profile: Interventional cardiologists and radiologists with specialist training in catheterisation procedures, operating within a hospital catheterisation laboratory.
eu_mdr_classification_and_rule: Class IIb, Rule 8 (invasive devices intended for transient use)
notified_body_name_and_id: BSI Group The Netherlands BV, NB 2797
contraindications: Contraindicated in patients with known hypersensitivity to device materials. Not for use in patients with severe peripheral vascular disease where catheter advancement may cause vessel damage.
uk_responsible_person: MedDevice UK Ltd, 100 Harley Street, London W1G 7JA
device_lifetime: 3 years from manufacture date (shelf life); single use
market_history: First placed on EU market June 2019; UK market September 2019 (UKCA December 2021)
